content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24,011 with VIX easing slightly to 17.85. Pharma (+2.14%) and Auto (+0.40%) leading; Energy weak (-0.70%). Q4 earnings season driving stock-specific moves — multiple held names benefited from results. Book is broadly green with two manageable laggards (BANDHANBNK, M&M).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD intent — SL already at 1030 (well above entry 984, locks in ~4.7% gain). CMP 1045.60 sits ~1.5% above SL, which respects the 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 strong (PAT +18%, GNPA sub-1%). No tightening needed; current SL is appropriate. Treating as HOLD via no-op MODIFY would be wasted signal — switching to HOLD in position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold +1.36% today, recovering. SL 119 ~4% below CMP 124.05 — appropriate buffer for ETF. Thesis intact (geopolitical hedge, RBI easing). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock hit ATH 1751 today, faded to 1727. SL 1710 is just 1% below CMP — adequate but not stretched. Holding. No change needed; emitting HOLD instead via position_actions to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 206.48 vs SL 206 — at SL boundary. Day low touched 206.00. If breaks further, SL trigger handles it. Q4 fundamentals strong (PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%). Letting SL do its job rather than panic-exit at SL — discipline mandates honoring the SL, not pre-empting it."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4585.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, CMP 4635 with intraday high 4671. Tightening SL slightly from 4600→4585 is sub-1% move and would be micro-adjust noise. Better to hold SL at 4600 (entry-locked, breakeven floor). Switching to HOLD via position_actions; this MODIFY entry retracted — see position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 7022. Stock at lifetime-high zone (7200 ATH). SL 6960 is 0.9% below CMP — borderline tight per trail-gap rule. Will keep at 6960 (locks in +0.9% gain, breakeven+). Strong Q4 (PAT +114%), Geojit TP 8500. Treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position barely positive after gap-up day. SL 825 is 2% below CMP 842. Capital goods rally strong but Q4 results pending = binary risk. Will reassess if Q4 announcement nears. HOLD for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative but recovering — CMP 366.95 vs entry 369. Q4 strong (PAT +30%). SL 358 = 2.4% below CMP, appropriate. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, CMP 826.60. Tightening SL from 815 → 818 is sub-1% move (0.37%) — micro-adjust per rules. Retracting; HOLD instead via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%, CMP 3255 vs SL 3245 — at SL boundary. Q4 strong (PAT +42%). Auto sector +0.4%. Honor the SL; don't pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%, CMP 1278.30 vs SL 1265 (1% below CMP — borderline). Q4 strong, Jefferies TP 2180. Keeping SL at 1265 (locks small gain). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, CMP 3010 vs SL 2950 (2% buffer). Defence rally intact, Q4 strong (EBITDA margin 16.8%). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 806.40. SL 780 = 3.3% below CMP. Q4 strong (record EBITDA margin 46.5%). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS BUY at 133.50 placed 481m ago and unfilled. Per ORDER HYGIENE, do not stack duplicate. The order is stale — placed pre-market and price has moved. CANCEL would be ideal but using NO_ACTION as schema-appropriate. Will let it expire at MIS auto-close. Not adding new HFCL exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1030 already locks in ~4.7% gain, sits 1.4% below CMP — adequate trail gap. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "ETF, low-volatility hedge. SL 119 (4% below CMP) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 = ~1% below CMP, at trail-gap minimum. Locks +0.6% gain. ATH zone — leaving room for normal chop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 206.00,
      "reasoning": "At SL boundary. Honor the SL; if it triggers, exit cleanly. Q4 fundamentals strong; near-term tape weak."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4600.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 4600 = entry+25, breakeven+. CMP 4635 → 0.75% gap (just under 1% threshold but within tolerance for high-momentum name pre-Q4 May 14). Holding; will trail post-Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 ~0.9% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Locks +0.9%. Stock at ATH zone, strong Q4. Holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results pending = binary risk. SL 825 (2% below) provides buffer. Will reassess as Q4 date confirms."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "reasoning": "Recovering off lows. SL 358 (2.4% below CMP) appropriate. Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening 815→818 would be sub-1% micro-adjust. Holding 815."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3245.00,
      "reasoning": "At SL boundary; honor SL. Q4 +42% PAT supports recovery thesis if SL holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 = 1% below CMP, at trail-gap floor. Locks small gain. Strong Q4 narrative."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2950.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 2950 (2% below) appropriate for high-beta defence name."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 780.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 780 = 3.3% buffer, generous given gap-up volatility. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong Q4 movers worth monitoring but NOT entering today: LALPATHLAB (20% UC yesterday + 11x volume — chase risk too high after parabolic move); BIOCON (Q4 results TOMORROW May 7 — binary catalyst within 1 session, MUST stay flat per rule 11); GRSE/HAL/TITAGARH/CAMS already represented in book; M&M/COFORGE/MARICO/ABCAPITAL/PNBHOUSING/NAVINFLUOR also held. Book is already well-allocated across themes (defence, financials, FMCG, pharma-via-NAVINFLUOR-chemicals, IT, Auto). No qualifying new entries given current 67% deployment + cluster exposure.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 CNC positions, 67% deployed, INR 332K cash. Book is broadly green with Q4-earnings-driven positions performing well. Two near-SL names (BANDHANBNK at 206 vs CMP 206.48; M&M at 3245 vs CMP 3255) — letting SLs do their work, not pre-empting. Cluster check: Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) ~25% — at the cluster ceiling, will not add more. Defence/Capital Goods (HAL, TITAGARH, GRSE) ~15% — also full. No new entries today: capital is appropriately deployed, qualifying setups (LALPATHLAB, BIOCON) carry chase-risk or imminent binary events. Stale HFCL MIS LIMIT 133.50 should ideally be cancelled — flagging for next cycle."
}
